name: @kevinmichaelchen/distilled-tmdb
description: Protocol-based Effect 4 SDK for the TMDB v3 API

scripts.check:generated: bun run generate && test -z "$(git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all -- src/services)"
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run check:generated
scripts.specs:fetch: git submodule update --force --init --recursive --depth=1 specs/distilled-spec-tmdb && git -C specs/distilled-spec-tmdb checkout -- .
scripts.specs:update: git -C specs/distilled-spec-tmdb fetch && git -C specs/distilled-spec-tmdb checkout main && git -C specs/distilled-spec-tmdb pull
